items.scenario: You are a regular swimmer who booked a six-week lap-swimming pass at a city aquatic center. After two weeks the early-morning lane hours were cut, so the time slot you paid for is no longer offered on weekdays.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Delgado. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the schedule change that affected your pass
Ask whether a refund or a different time is possible
Suggest a solution that would let you keep swimming
items.subject: Lap-swim pass and the new morning hours

items.scenario: You are a senior who hopes to graduate this spring, but the registrar's audit shows you are missing one writing credit. You believe a transfer course from your first year should count and want this checked before the deadline.
items.direction: Write an email to Dr. Okafor. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain the missing credit shown in your audit
Describe the transfer course you think should count
Ask how to have the requirement reviewed quickly
items.subject: Graduation audit and a missing writing credit

items.scenario: You recently ordered a pair of running shoes online in your usual size, but the pair that arrived runs noticeably small and pinches after a short run. You would like to exchange them before an upcoming race.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Tanaka. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the sizing problem with the shoes you received
Ask how an exchange can be arranged in time
Tell her about the race date you are trying to meet
items.subject: Exchange request for running shoes that run small

items.scenario: You borrowed a friend's portable projector for a movie night last weekend, and afterward you noticed the remote no longer works and one cable is bent. You want to make things right before returning it.
items.direction: Write an email to Diego. In your email, do the following:
goals: Tell him what happened to the projector after your movie night
Explain how you plan to fix or replace the parts
Ask when would be a good time to return it
items.subject: About your projector and the broken remote
